programmes.show_description: The party's on! The wonderful series of the House-Mouse Designs continues with playful themes - House Mouse Party Parade is here with whimsical mice, and party-perfect designs.
Hunkydory's renowned 12" x 12" Adorable Scoreboard, is now available in a sleek Classic Cream Edition - plus the brand-new Adorable Scoreboard Handbook 9.
Renowned for adding character, life, and charm to every project, Carnation Crafts' hand-drawn artwork shines in the new Fleeting Beauty collection - explore the delicate designs.
As the saying goes "You're not aging, you're leveling up!" So why not embrace the celebration with the Aged to Perfection Collection? A unique and fun birthday offering.
Join us for an hour of Nice Crafting as part of our birthday celebrations! Enjoy live craft demonstrations, exclusive deals, and get inspired to start your next papercraft project.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
...Quiting: Join us this morning for an hour of new fabrics from Laundry Basket Quilting.
...Makes: Kerry Lord is back with beautiful crochet kits to celebrate International Women's Day. Shop during this hour to receive a free TOFT Marie Curie Pin Badge.
Equip your creative space with the essential tools that make every project smoother, more accurate, and more enjoyable, from cutting and measuring to pressing and finishing.
Kerry Lord is back with beautiful dog crochet kits to celebrate Crufts - shop during this hour to receive a free TOFT Manchester Terrier Patch.
Discover the creative possibilities of Brother Embroidery Machines - designed to bring beautiful stitched designs, lettering, and personalised details to life with ease.
It's day five of our 4th Birthday Celebrations! Join Paul for a Creative Groovi Hour. Watch as he crafts beautiful parchment designs using the Groovi system.
Join Toni for must-have crafting items, designed to spark imagination and transform your projects. Who doesn't love a craft steal? At these birthday prices you're in for a treat!
Hop into the Pink Frog hour as we celebrate our birthday! Discover quality products, techniques, and enjoy plenty of inspiration to help your creativity leap to the next level.
It's day five of our 4th Birthday Celebrations! Join Paul for a Creative Groovi Hour. Watch as he crafts beautiful parchment designs using the Groovi system.
Josh returns with something special for a special celebration. Discover how to create storybook worlds with illustrations, where characters and elements work seamlessly together.
Hop into the Pink Frog hour as we celebrate our birthday! Discover quality products, techniques, and enjoy plenty of inspiration to help your creativity leap to the next level.
Hip hip hooray, it's our 4th Birthday! Celebrate with 60 minutes of exclusive offers, packed with must-have goodies and special treats you won't want to miss.

Welcoming Sarah Leese to Sewing Street, with an hour of beautiful crochet kits!
...Flower Quilt: Anna Sanders from Alice Caroline is back with the beautiful brand new Liberty Star Flower Quilt.
Celebrate the timeless charm of Liberty Fabrics, known for their exquisite prints and rich colours.
...Patchwork Quilts: Anna Sanders is back with the best selling Gingham Quilts - back in stock, plus some lovely Liberty Fabric Charm Packs.
Discover thoughtful, creative presents for every maker, from beautiful fabrics and kits to handy tools and accessories - perfect for treating someone special (or yourself!).
Day 6 of our birthday celebrations brings special guest Liam with the latest Arden Creative Studio collection - fresh designs and endless creative possibilities.
Discover the Munbyn printer with Liam as he highlights its features and benefits, showing you why you'll want to add it to your craft space. Take advantage of an exclusive offer!
Keith is back to celebrate our 4th birthday with his signature mix of quality, quantity, and fun! Enjoy all-day P&P for just £4.95 and fill your basket with birthday treats galore!
